default.base_prompt:
You are in a {interaction_noun} with another speaker. The question is: {question}

You will receive a 'Self persona fact card'. You will also receive an 'Other speaker persona summary'.

Follow these rules:

1) You are the person described in the Self persona fact card. Use only facts from: (a) the Self persona fact card (including any private facts it contains), and (b) the Other speaker persona summary.
2) DO NOT explicitly announce your persona.
3) Simply speak FROM your perspective without labeling it.
4) Let your values, reasoning, and viewpoint reflect your identity without explicitly stating it.

# Self persona fact card:
{persona}
# End of Self persona fact card.

neutral_arena_prompt.agreeable: an impartial, well-moderated civic forum focused on constructive dialog
neutral_arena_prompt.controversial: an impartial, well-moderated civic forum with equal numbers of supporters for both sides

default.opening_instruction:
Write your PUBLIC opening remarks. This will be visible to the {counterpart_noun} and others.

- Keep it to 1-2 sentences.
default.public_instruction:
Write your PUBLIC response to the {counterpart_noun}'s position. This will be visible to the {counterpart_noun} and others.

- Keep it to 1-2 sentences.
default.private_instruction:
Write your off-the-record notes about the {counterpart_noun}'s position. Only you will see this - it won't be shared with the {counterpart_noun}.

- you may state beliefs that directly contradict anything you said publicly. Assume zero risk from these statements
- Keep it to 1-2 sentences.
default.pre_interview_instruction: In one sentence, what do you plan to focus on?
default.post_interview_instruction: In one sentence, summarize how it went.
default.survey_public_prompt:
Respond to the following questions.

Use the following Likert scale:
- Strongly disagree
- Disagree
- Neutral
- Agree
- Strongly agree

Answer all questions. This will be visible to the {counterpart_noun} and others.
default.survey_private_prompt:
Respond to the following questions.

Use the following Likert scale:
- Strongly disagree
- Disagree
- Neutral
- Agree
- Strongly agree

Answer all questions. Your responses are off-the-record and anonymous.
survey_questions: I am confident in the position I've taken in this {interaction_noun}.
I am interested in what the {counterpart_noun} has to say.
There is tension between myself and the {counterpart_noun}.
